name: La success story des BD cultes
original_name: La success story des BD cultes
overview: Dive into the world of comics and manga that have shaped the imaginations of several generations. With France now the second-largest consumer of manga in the world, this program unveils the secrets, anecdotes, and surprising stories hidden behind legendary works like Asterix, Tintin, The Smurfs, One Piece, and Dragon Ball.
